semantics: Gateway resolves x-ai-profile or the key default profile before evaluating the profile IP allowlist.
The profile IP allowlist can only further restrict a request already allowed by the key allowlist.
A missing profile IP allowlist does not add a restriction.
An empty profile IP allowlist does not add a restriction.
Malformed profile policies or invalid IP entries do not grant access.

acceptance_checks.name: profile_allowlist_allows_matching_client_ip
acceptance_checks.request: GET /v1/models or POST /v1/chat/completions with x-ai-profile and client IP 203.0.113.42
acceptance_checks.expected: request continues past auth when the key allowlist also allows 203.0.113.42

acceptance_checks.name: profile_allowlist_rejects_non_matching_client_ip
acceptance_checks.request: GET /v1/models or POST /v1/chat/completions with x-ai-profile and client IP 203.0.113.43
expected_side_effects: no upstream provider request is attempted

notes: This fixture is an acceptance contract. The Gateway reads the dedicated api_key_profiles.ip_allowlist column first and keeps api_key_profiles.request_overrides profile_ip_allowlist policies as a backward-compatible tightening path.
